title: Allow units used in number column to display on Gantt

posts.author: Tyler1280 (Tyler Davidson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I have a Gantt chart that I want to label with the revenue associated with the project. In the current state there is no way to have the units used in the number column to display on the Gantt.

What are you trying to achieve

Allow for Units used in the numbers column to display on the Gantt chart when selecting “label by → number column”.
